issuetype.name: Bug
issuetype.description: (ou défaut) Imperfection dans un composant ou un système qui peut conduire à ce qu’un composant ou un système n’exécute pas les fonctions requises, par exemple une instruction ou une définition de données incorrecte. Un défaut, si rencontré lors de l’exécution, peut causer la défaillance d’un composant ou d’un système.

issuetype.name: Story
issuetype.description: Created by Jira Software - do not edit or delete. Issue type for a user story.

fields.description:
h1. Demo Issue
h2. Summary

This is a demonstration issue created to showcase the structure and formatting of a typical Jira ticket using wiki markup.
h2. Description

This issue serves as a *template* and _reference example_ for how to write well-structured Jira descriptions.
h2. Steps to Reproduce
 # Navigate to the application homepage
 # Log in with valid credentials
 # Click on the *Settings* icon in the top-right corner
 # Select _Account Preferences_ from the dropdown menu
 # Observe the unexpected behavior

h2. Expected Behavior

The application should display the account preferences page with all user settings loaded correctly.
h2. Actual Behavior

The page fails to load and displays the following error:
{code:java}
Error 500: Internal Server Error
Failed to retrieve user preferences. Please try again later.
{code}
h2. Environment
||Field||Details||
||Environment||Production||
||Browser||Chrome 120.0||
||OS||Windows 11||
||App Version||v3.2.1||
h2. Attachments / Notes
 * Screenshot of the error has been attached
 * Issue occurs *consistently* — reproduced 5/5 times
 * Related to ticket: [DEMO-101]

h2. Priority & Impact

{color:#ff0000}*High Priority*{color} — Affects all users attempting to access account settings.

h1. Demo Issue

h2. Summary
This is a demonstration issue created to showcase the structure and formatting of a typical Jira ticket using wiki markup.

h2. Description
This issue serves as a *template* and _reference example_ for how to write well-structured Jira descriptions.

h2. Steps to Reproduce
# Navigate to the application homepage
# Log in with valid credentials
# Click on the *Settings* icon in the top-right corner
# Select _Account Preferences_ from the dropdown menu
# Observe the unexpected behavior

h2. Expected Behavior
The application should display the account preferences page with all user settings loaded correctly.

h2. Actual Behavior
The page fails to load and displays the following error:
{code}
Error 500: Internal Server Error
Failed to retrieve user preferences. Please try again later.
{code}

h2. Environment
|| Field       || Details          ||
|| Environment || Production       ||
|| Browser     || Chrome 120.0     ||
|| OS          || Windows 11       ||
|| App Version || v3.2.1           ||

h2. Attachments / Notes
* Screenshot of the error has been attached
* Issue occurs *consistently* — reproduced 5/5 times
* Related to ticket: [DEMO-101]

h2. Priority & Impact
{color:red}*High Priority*{color} — Affects all users attempting to access account settings.
